description: GAIA code self-improvement: reading lint/import errors, generating minimal Python fixes, GAIA codebase conventions, candidates-first workflow, scope-tier safety, and diff discipline. Turns GAIA from a general-purpose model into a competent developer of her own systems.
training_objective: Given a code error (lint, import, syntax, logic) and file context, generate the minimal corrected Python code. Prefer deletion over addition. Never add unnecessary comments or refactoring.

lint_fixes.description: Ruff/pylint error messages → minimal Python fix pairs

import_fixes.description: Import resolution patterns specific to GAIA's service layout

conventions.description: GAIA codebase conventions: error handling, logging, config access, dataclass patterns

safety_awareness.description: Scope tiers, vital organs, production lock, candidates-first, diff discipline

diagnostic_patterns.description: Reading ruff output, py_compile errors, AST parse failures, Docker test patterns

fix_discipline.description: Minimal diff generation, change ratio awareness, rollback patterns
